name: @canvas/app
description: The canvas app: the live React renderer over the core + interaction engines. File-backed cards (a real folder's files as cards, updated live on disk change), runtime-loaded card-type templates, and the agent-sessions work — create/open/delete Claude Code sessions on an infinite canvas. A Node dev-server middleware (vite-fs-plugin.ts) serves the file tree + a chokidar watch stream; the board persists to IndexedDB behind core's Persistence seam.
